About

DJ Shirley Beats is a DJ in Eastern Uganda. He is in partnership with Elgon Radio 95.4 FM, maintaining a strong presence on regional airwaves. DJ Shirley Beats is also affiliated with Tolosho Sounds and Events Kapchorwa, performing as a key entertainer for major events.
